title: SlimeBlock
description: Hypixel skyblock mod that will be getting more new features most never seen before (also useless sometimes) (also some already seen before)
body: This mod adds interesting hypixel skyblock features, like the rift timer, it shows you the time since you have last visited the rift, this is useful for many skyblock players because you can gain free motes every 2 hours, you are able to disable the timer and also change its location on your screen. Press r to open the settings.
